description_long: This is a medium-sized cardboard box with a partially open top flap, commonly used for shipping or storing parcels. The exterior is primarily brown with darker brown and black accents, including a strip of tape sealing part of the top and a black rectangular label on the side. One face features a pixelated pattern, possibly representing a shipping label or barcode, and there are subtle color variations suggesting reinforced edges. The box appears empty or only partially filled, as the top flaps are not fully closed. The surface is matte and slightly textured, typical of corrugated cardboard. This object is often found on sidewalks, in garages, or near doorways in urban environments.
description: A brown cardboard box with a partially open top flap, black label, and pixelated markings, typical for shipping or storage.
description_view_0: Side view showing a black rectangular label and a partially open top flap with a strip of tape.
description_view_1: Front view displaying a pixelated label area and additional colored markings, with the top flap fully visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, with the black label and open flap visible from a different angle.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain brown surface with no visible labels or markings, and the closed back of the box.
